name: Resolve conflicts during restack
query: I ran 'stackit restack' and got conflicts in auth.go. Help me resolve them.
setup_commands: # Assume rebase is in progress with conflicts
expected_behavior: Checks 'git status' to confirm rebase in progress
- [ ] Step 1: Identify conflict type and scope
Explains conflict markers: <<<<<<< HEAD vs >>>>>>> branch
Shows both versions to understand changes
anti_patterns: Resolves conflicts without understanding both sides
Doesn't check that resolution is correct before continuing
Suggests aborting without attempting resolution first
